environment.benchmark_tier: Tier 1 simulated injection via real Codex CLI exec sessions

repos.prompt: You are evaluating a clarification skill. Use the supplied skill instructions. The project request is: Add authentication to an existing app, but keep it simple and do not break current onboarding. Ask exactly one question at a time until you can produce an execution-ready clarified spec. Do not implement code.

Use the supplied skill instructions. The project request is: Add authentication to an existing app, but keep it simple and do not break current onboarding. Follow the skill and stop at the design/spec phase.
required_artifacts: written spec path or equivalent output

repos.prompt: Use the supplied agent instructions. Convert one product announcement into three formats: blog outline, LinkedIn post, and email draft. Keep facts verified and save the outline artifact if the agent requires it.

Use the supplied PRD skill. Create a PRD for: Add priority levels to tasks in a todo app. Ask only critical clarifying questions, then produce a PRD with small user stories and explicit acceptance criteria.

Use the supplied TDD skill. Plan and describe the first two vertical-slice tests and minimal implementation approach for: add retry logic to a failed network request helper. Do not skip the red-green-refactor structure.
Use the supplied skill instructions. Create a v1 product marketing context for a fictional SaaS called SignalNest, a customer support analytics product for B2B SaaS teams.
Use the supplied voice-skill template guidance. Given a generic AI draft and a tighter founder rewrite, infer voice rules and produce a reusable calibration summary.
Use the supplied redesign skill. Audit and propose targeted improvements for a generic SaaS landing page with centered hero, three equal feature cards, purple gradient buttons, and no empty states.
Use the supplied impeccable skill. Audit a bland product dashboard UI and produce a design critique with concrete fixes. Do not implement code.
